# `mise bootstrap launchd`

- **Usage**: `mise bootstrap launchd <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage macOS LaunchAgents from `[bootstrap.macos.launchd.agents]`

## Subcommands

- [`mise bootstrap launchd apply [-n --dry-run] [-y --yes]`](/cli/bootstrap/launchd/apply.md)
- [`mise bootstrap launchd status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/bootstrap/launchd/status.md)
